# SquadTrip

## What is SquadTrip?
SquadTrip is the all-in-one booking, payment collection, and group management platform for group travel organizers. It replaces spreadsheets, Venmo requests, and manual follow-ups with automated payment plans, professional booking pages, and a real-time dashboard.

## Core Product
- **Booking Pages**: Create professional trip landing pages with packages, add-ons, pricing, and itinerary details. Share one link with all travelers.
- **Automatic Payment Plans**: Set up monthly auto-billing so travelers are charged on schedule. No more chasing payments.
- **Real-Time Dashboard**: Track who paid, who hasn't, total revenue, and payment statuses at a glance.
- **Automated Reminders**: Payment reminders, receipts, and confirmations sent automatically via email and SMS.
- **Traveler Portal**: Travelers can view their balance, update payment methods, download receipts, and manage their bookings.
- **Buy Now Pay Later**: Offer Klarna, Affirm, and Afterpay as payment options for travelers.
- **Promo Codes & Referrals**: Create custom promo codes and track traveler referrals.
- **Affiliate Tracking**: Track affiliate sales with unique tracking links.
- **E-Sign Documents**: Embed e-signature processes into traveler checkout forms.
- **Registration Info Collection**: Collect passport info, dietary restrictions, roommate preferences at checkout.

## Who Uses SquadTrip
- **Tour Operators & Travel Agencies**: Manage group bookings at scale, automate payments, track inventory across multiple trips.
- **Group Trip Organizers**: Plan bachelor/bachelorette parties, family reunions, friend trips without spreadsheet headaches.
- **Destination Wedding Planners**: Collect payments, gather RSVPs, manage guest communications for destination weddings.
- **Retreat Organizers**: Sell wellness retreats, yoga trips, and group experiences with flexible payment plans.

## Pricing
- **Starter Plan**: Free forever. Unlimited trips, booking pages, payment plans, reporting dashboard, email reminders, chat & email support. 6% processing fee (includes Stripe's 2.9% + 30¢).
- **Launch Plan**: $29/month or $299/year (save 14%). Everything in Starter plus: custom branding, scheduled emails, unlimited SMS, social media links, team members, BNPL options, promo codes, referral tracking, affiliate program, priority support.

## Key Stats
- 2,000+ organizers
- 50,000+ travelers booked
- 500+ destinations
- 4.8/5 rating

## How It Works
1. **Create Your Trip**: Add packages, rooms, pricing, and trip details. Takes about 10 minutes.
2. **Share Your Link**: Send one link to your group. Travelers book and pay online.
3. **Track Everything**: Watch payments come in, send updates, and export reports from one dashboard.
